description_long: This doll features a segmented, robotic design with a predominantly white and red color scheme. Its head is styled with two high pigtails, blue eyes, and a partially exposed mechanical face on the left side, revealing intricate endoskeleton details. The doll wears a red dress with puffed sleeves, a flared skirt, and a circular emblem at the waist, complemented by matching red shoes with yellow buttons. The arms and legs are jointed, with visible mechanical connectors and bolts, giving it an animatronic appearance. The hands are articulated, with the right hand open and the left hand partially closed. The overall look is both playful and slightly mechanical, blending elements of a classic children's toy with robotic features.
description: A segmented, red-and-white animatronic doll with pigtails, a red dress, and visible mechanical joints and face details.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doll's face with one side partially exposed to reveal mechanical parts, pigtails, blue eyes, red dress, and articulated limbs.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the pigtails, the layered skirt, and the exposed mechanical structure of the face and joints.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head with pigtails, the back of the red dress, and the segmented limbs with visible bolts.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the intact side of the face, the pigtail, and the mechanical arm and leg joints.
attribute_clothing_style: The doll is dressed in a stylized red dress with puffed sleeves and a flared skirt, featuring a circular emblem at the waist. The outfit is reminiscent of a circus or clown costume, with matching red shoes adorned with yellow buttons. No visible patterns are present, and the style is playful and theatrical.
attribute_pose: The doll stands upright with its head facing forward, right arm bent and hand open, left arm slightly extended with the hand partially closed, and both legs straight. The torso is upright and symmetrical.
attribute_facial_expression: The doll's facial expression is neutral with wide-open blue eyes, slightly arched eyebrows, and a small, closed mouth. The left side of the face is partially exposed, revealing mechanical components.
attribute_hair_style: Short, bright red hair styled in two high pigtails with blue hair ties, smooth texture.
